fields.review_findings: Effort/listing surface is not fully closeable because the cited HTTP listing validation fails: `cargo test --manifest-path memory-api/tools/http/ticket-http/Cargo.toml listing -- --nocapture` has 16 passed and 1 failed. Exact failure: list_tickets_uses_scan_root_label_for_ticket_ref_workspace expected `ticket_ref.workspace == "child"`, got `child--c1f343de`.
fields.title: [ticket-system] Add effort field for token-budget estimates

fields.review_findings: Pushback remediated and reverified. The cited HTTP listing failure is fixed in memory-api/tools/http/ticket-http/src/serve/handlers/tickets/types.rs: owning_workspace_for_path preserves the scan-root public label (best_label = root.label) rather than the label--hash canonical form, so ticket_ref.workspace now reports 'child'. Validation passed: rtk cargo test --manifest-path tools/http/ticket-http/Cargo.toml listing -- --nocapture (17 passed, previously 16 passed/1 failed) and list_tickets_uses_scan_root_label_for_ticket_ref_workspace (1 passed). Effort field / token-budget surface was previously reviewed coherent across CLI, board, MCP, TOON, and generated guidance.
fields.title: [ticket-system] Add effort field for token-budget estimates
